tagline: Professional Pool Cleaning & Maintenance in Northeast Florida

hero.headline: Your Pool, Always Crystal Clear
hero.subheadline: Stop worrying about chemicals, algae, and equipment headaches. Revitalize Pool & Spa handles every detail of your pool care so you can skip the work and just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care,<br class="hidden md:block"> Chemicals Included
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency green pool recovery, we handle every aspect of pool care with all chemicals included in every plan.

cards.title: Rejuvenate Plan
cards.description: Our most popular full-service weekly plan — vacuuming, skimming, brushing, filter cleaning, equipment inspection, and all chemicals included.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and salt systems. Most issues resolved in a single visit to keep your pool running smoothly.

cards.title: Green to Blue Recovery
cards.description: Neglected pool turned green? We restore it to crystal clear blue water with thorough cleaning and chemical treatment — fast turnaround guaranteed.

cards.title: Refresh Plan
cards.description: 52 weekly inspections per year with water balancing, algae treatment, and all chemicals included. No need to store a single chemical at home.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Reliable maintenance programs for HOAs, hotels, and community pools with consistent scheduling, compliance support, and dedicated account management.

cards.title: Elevate Plan
cards.description: Specialized above-ground pool maintenance with tailored service designed specifically for your pool type, keeping it clean and perfectly balanced.

how_it_works.headline: Pool Care in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Text Us for a Free Quote
steps.description: Send us a text or call and we will respond the same day with an honest, no-pressure quote. Most customers are scheduled within days.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our licensed technicians arrive on schedule every week. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, photo updates — all handled so you never have to think about it.

steps.title: Enjoy a Perfect Pool Year-Round
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready every single day. We send text updates and photos after every visit so you always know the status.

about.label: Why Northeast Florida Trusts Us
about.headline: Licensed, Local, and Obsessed With Clean Pools
about.description: Founded in 2022, Revitalize Pool & Spa has quickly become one of Northeast Florida's most trusted pool service companies. We hold Florida Pool Contractor License CPC1461353 and are a Google Guaranteed provider. Every service plan includes all chemicals — you never have to buy, store, or handle a single bottle. Our team communicates proactively with text updates and photo reports after every visit because we believe you deserve to know exactly what is happening with your pool.

features.title: All Chemicals Included
features.description: Every plan covers all chemicals needed to keep your water balanced and clear. No surprise charges, no trips to the pool store.

features.title: Text Updates & Photo Reports
features.description: After every service visit, you receive a text with photos and a summary. You always know what was done and how your pool looks.

features.title: Same-Day Response Guaranteed
features.description: We respond to every inquiry the same day. Need a quote or emergency service? Text us and expect a reply within hours, not days.

pricing.headline: Transparent Plans. All Chemicals Included.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool and budget. Every plan includes all chemicals — upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our Crystal Clear Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool is not crystal clear and swim-ready after our service, we will come back and make it right at no additional cost. We also send photo reports after every visit so you can see the results for yourself. Your satisfaction is not just a promise — it is how we have earned a 4.7-star rating across 65+ reviews.

faqs.question: Are all chemicals really included in every plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, every maintenance plan includes all chemicals needed to keep your pool clean and balanced. You never need to buy, store, or handle chemicals yourself. It is all part of the service.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within a few days. For green pool emergencies, we often respond the same day. Text us at 904-842-2223 and we will get you on the schedule fast.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. After each visit, you receive a text with photos and a summary of what was done.

faqs.question: What areas in Northeast Florida do you service?
faqs.answer: We serve Jacksonville, Atlantic Beach, Neptune Beach, Ponte Vedra Beach, St. Augustine, and surrounding Northeast Florida communities. If you are unsure whether we cover your area, just text us.

faqs.question: Do you offer commercial pool service?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We maintain pools for HOAs, hotels, and community centers across Northeast Florida. Commercial clients receive dedicated scheduling, compliance support, and consistent service you can count on.

testimonials.name: Amy F.
testimonials.text: We LOVE the service we receive from Revitalize Pool and Spa. Attention to detail is outstanding and they are very responsive. Our pool has never looked better.

testimonials.name: Sandra H.
testimonials.text: Excellent company, great communication, pool always looks incredible. They send photos after every visit so I always know exactly how my pool looks even when I am traveling.

testimonials.name: Evan's Client
testimonials.text: Evan came out almost every day until our pool was crystal clear and good as new! He checked in via text and asked for picture updates each morning. He made us feel like he actually cared about our pool. The pool was a MESS and now it is perfect!
